title: ZeroTouch — Identity Lifecycle Engine
description: Built and deployed a full Joiner/Mover/Leaver identity automation system: a Flutter web intake form triggers an Azure Function written in PowerShell 7, which drives Microsoft Graph to create, modify, and offboard users in a live Entra ID tenant, with branded SendGrid email and department-based group access.
outcome: Production-deployed JML engine running against a real Entra tenant, with a public Flutter web front end on Cloudflare Pages

title: ReAct AI Agent — Anthropic SDK
description: Built a minimal ReAct-loop AI agent in Python using the Anthropic SDK directly — no LangChain, no framework overhead. Agent reasons, acts, and observes across multi-step tasks.
outcome: Functional multi-step AI agent with zero third-party framework dependency

title: NOC Alert Triage Automation
description: Designed and operated automated alert triage workflows in a telecom NOC environment, reducing manual intervention on repetitive network events across 2G–4G infrastructure (Nokia, Huawei).
outcome: Reduced manual NOC intervention on repetitive alerts across multi-vendor infrastructure

title: PulseFlix — Movie & Trailer Discovery App
description: Built a cross-platform movie and trailer discovery app in Flutter using Riverpod codegen and Clean Architecture, backed by Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Crashlytics) and the TMDB API. Features hybrid YouTube trailer playback (in-browser iframe on web, native app handoff on mobile) and a full GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline.
outcome: Reached closed testing on Google Play with a live web build deployed to Cloudflare Pages

title: Community Health Centre App
description: Volunteer Flutter development for Carlington community centre here in Ottawa, contributing to a mobile solution aimed at improving revenue and expense management.
outcome: Improved digital service access for underserved community members in Toronto

title: Google Calendar Automation Workflow
description: Built an n8n workflow on a self-hosted VPS that automates Google Calendar event management via OAuth2, reducing manual scheduling overhead and syncing events across systems.
outcome: Eliminated manual calendar management across connected systems

title: Email Triage Automation
description: Designed an n8n workflow that automatically classifies, labels, and routes incoming emails by priority and category — cutting manual inbox processing time significantly.
outcome: Significantly reduced manual inbox processing time through intelligent routing
